{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323183453C8A77E0CA6A45B13499D"}"},"total":635},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7507709175345857304","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书写得可以，诙谐有趣，有些小瑕疵无伤大雅。但是没想到评分这么低，哪些狗屁倒灶的反而上了热推和高分榜。啧，还好让我无意中发现这本书了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748041430,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxQ347OayW7/j3fg9ab0Nr1NINhRp3jn1SXgwYRKfRvL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4eb41d584a343d0af24d08727180cbc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792921&x-signature=RwFxCs9bSG0wxtFWSF9134utWYY%3D","user_id":"4022470181659259","user_name":"过秦川"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4022470181659259","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】
现代非遗爱好者陆启霖意外穿了。
一觉醒来，成了村里娘早逝，爹失踪的八岁小傻子。
不过好在爷奶与大伯夫妻对他真心疼爱，两个堂哥对他真切关爱，尚不算天崩开局。
奈何，家里两个叔叔接连搞事。
外头，还有奸佞小人暗害兄长。
村内，不怀好意者蠢蠢欲动中。
原想躺平的陆启霖决定不再摆烂，拍案而起。
“我要读书！”
他要利用过目不忘的“金手指”，一步步带飞全家。
衣，穿衣，穿锦衣。
饭，吃饭，吃好饭。
宅，住宅，住大宅。
且看他如何科举连中六元，扶摇直上九万里！
此文慢热温馨诙谐,渐入佳境。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/080e0441e82dc50e2b5f217830f900de","author":"方锦溪","author_id":"","book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_name":"从傻儿到文圣，我靠科举单开族谱","book_short_name":"麒麟状元","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459967745686241816","read_count":"29784","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1739390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"846","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,腹黑,单女主,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f6ba1b0be5ca11ab09d4bc5f623d7c10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446093&x-signature=o6d0DtwGBGhQ78c67TDqhgB%2FTY8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93900158437","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"268"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323183453C8A77E0CA6A45B13499D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4886,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":56142,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":14035},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1748053521,"author_reply_time":1748257778,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7481663982588691224","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有人情味的一家人，大郎为小六筹划，深谋远虑值得一赞，主人公的第一桶金是卖簪花，希望与以往的穿越剧不同，不要那种大开大合的做买卖，又无所不能的，现在只阅读几十章还不错，再往后看看如何"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741963843,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新欢自然随性，走遍中国，环游世界","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2h64So6y7TR0jZdG6zj5l4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"817689886473200","user_name":"毛毛亲亲宝贝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"817689886473200","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】

tion":21943,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39044,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":20189},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1742003766,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588448515421881112","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情之力可真厉害啊，祭祖这段，坏人如有神助，主角这边关键时身边人全都有理由不在，直接敲晕绑走，然后主角也是神勇，8岁小身板能在水下靠一把小剪子反杀成年壮汉，能独自一人带走一个昏迷的成年女人，能徒手（或靠一把小剪子？）造一张木笺…然后终于引出“山中人”顺利进入死士谋反剧情…反正经过这一出，后面主角的8岁日常忽然就看不进去了，留评走人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766826550,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"今天又活过了颓废的一天呢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4gqqYdqzmXhE1fN3Hxb87o=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"16091401477","user_name":"生又何欢，死又不敢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"16091401477","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】
